basics.name: Juan David González Bedoya
basics.label: Sr Software Engineer
basics.summary: I am passionate about building software from architecture to development and maintenance. I am constantly learning and evolving, focused on developing quality software that generates real value for the business by participating in decision making. I prefer clean architectures (mainly DDD) and event-driven architectures (EDA), functional, object-oriented and asynchronous programming.
